step_rows.detail: The controller-owned Mac launch packet keeps Tailnet worker `archlinux` and submitted run `tailrun-home-admitted-20260327e` explicit, so the local cluster still starts on the Mac instead of moving control-plane ownership onto the worker.

The retained CUDA decision run `same-node-wallclock-retained-cuda` stays inside the admitted 600 second accelerator budget and remains baseline-comparable under execution backend `open_adapter_backend.cuda.gpt_oss_lm_head` on `cuda:0`.

Checkpoint family `swarm.local.open_adapter.policy:tailrun-home-admitted-20260328k` stays durable through pointer digest `dd1aa85c355eb43934a20afe7e4204b3ed82bb85f4fe392dfde45229f4e434f8` and ref `checkpoint://swarm/first-swarm-live-plan/policy` before the artifact leaves the worker lane.

The admitted recovery packet keeps restore evidence explicit for run `tailrun-home-admitted-20260328k` with checkpoint pointer `dd1aa85c355eb43934a20afe7e4204b3ed82bb85f4fe392dfde45229f4e434f8` and replay-required stale-worker discipline instead of hiding recovery behind a happy-path run.

The accelerator-backed run returns portable bundle `fixtures/apple_adapter/runs/tailrun_admitted_device_matrix_20260327b/archlinux_cuda/portable_bundle.safetensors` (sha256 `5e3b708051e6ccb86d9efe5e13f4ab425b3ec1bb74c28f6cc8f2b44a49129f7f`) onto the controller-owned Mac path, closing the export side of the Mac -> 4080 -> Mac loop.

Back-on-Mac validation reuses machine class `host_cpu_aarch64` with anchor `tassadar.reference_linear_steps_per_second` and fast-route metric `tassadar.hull_cache_steps_per_second` while keeping min hull-cache speedup 1.690978 and max remaining CPU gap 2.683604 explicit for the returned 4080 bundle.

cluster_closure_detail: The retained current-best registration `psion_executor_local_cluster_registration_4080_v1` now keeps the full Mac -> 4080 -> Mac loop green: controller launch on Mac, accelerator-backed decision run `same-node-wallclock-retained-cuda`, durable checkpoint `checkpoint://swarm/first-swarm-live-plan/policy`, restore rehearsal, returned bundle `fixtures/apple_adapter/runs/tailrun_admitted_device_matrix_20260327b/archlinux_cuda/portable_bundle.safetensors`, and back-on-Mac validation under `host_cpu_aarch64` all stay explicit in one packet.
summary: The executor lane now has one retained local-cluster roundtrip closeout packet. Current-best run `tailrun-home-admitted-20260328k` keeps all six admitted steps green across the Mac controller, the 4080 worker, and the Mac-side validation return path, so EPIC 4 cluster closure is now machine-legible instead of implied by separate launch, checkpoint, recovery, and export packets.
